Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MELODY MALDONADO's Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses.

It appears that Plaintiff's motion to compel further discovery was originally filed on January 17, 2023 and has been continued several times by agreement of the parties. The motion appears to address discovery related to Plaintiff's PAGA claims. On May 19, 2023, the Court issued an Order granting in part and denying in part Defendants' motion to compel arbitration. In the Order the court ordered that Plaintiff's representative PAGA claims stayed pending the California Supreme Court's determination of Adolph v. Uber Technologies, Inc. Accordingly, the undersigned believes that Plaintiff's motion should be taken off calendar without prejudice to refiling after the stay is lifted.

Judge Pro Tem: J. Timothy Nardell, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/jpt)
